summary: Add i2i op to 6 image models (5 SDXL + Chroma) mirroring KREA2. (A) models.js: add 'i2i' to supportedOps + i2i:'<t2i json>' to workflows. (B) USER: add Input_Is_i2i gate to each t2i graph. Started in doing.
Created directly in doing — actively wiring models.js part (A).

Chroma i2i DONE: generate_chroma.py (stamps Input_Image->placeholder.png + forces Input_Is_i2i->false, scrubbing the template test-state true), registry Chroma_ prefix, ran -> Chroma_t2i.json. models.js (A) done all 6. OPEN: SDXL x5 sdxl_t2i_template.json i2i nodes (user) + matching stamps in generate_sdxl.py (waiting for template).

SCOPE GREW: session now DEPRECATES tier-1 entirely (docs+code). Discovered code-coupling: (1) commandExecutor:569-570 always-emit bare Positive/Negative + :725-739 dual-emit bare+Input_ alias -> drop bare half once ALL workflows tier-2; (2) mask matcher :798,:803 hardcodes lowercase detected/output -> img_auto_mask renamed Output_Detected/Output_image, needs matcher update; (3) resizeInjector.js FLIP_TITLE/ROTATE_TITLE/FLIP_ENABLED_TITLE (imageflip/image rotate/flip) -> renamed Input_Flip_Image/Input_Rotate_Image/Input_Flip, _requireNodes THROWS so resize op crashes until updated; (4) PromptBoxControls nodeTitle Upscale_Factor/Auto_Grid; (5) models.js remove tier field (wan22-5b tier:1 last one). Combined MpiSaveVideo (video_interpolate/upscale/resize_video) = Output_Video titled, capture already handles, no code change. Utility workflows exported: 5/6 API-format OK; resize_video.json exported WRONG (UI format, unusable) - re-export needed; image_upscale.json Upscale_Model still bare - rename needed.

WORKFLOW PHASE COMPLETE: full fleet now tier-2 (zero bare injected-target titles). generate_sdxl.py patched w/ placeholder + Is_i2i=false stamps, regen 15 SDXL runtimes; generate_krea2.py regen (krea2 upscalers tier-2); 6 utility workflows exported API-format + tier-2; Chroma done. SDXL i2i wired all 5 (Input_Is_i2i/Input_Image/Input_denoise present, is_i2i baked false, img placeholder). NEXT: code pass (resizeInjector 3 titles, mask matcher, PromptBoxControls nodeTitle, drop bare emit LAST, remove model.tier) then docs/rules/playbook/memory.
